title: cyperus distans
intro: Cyperus distans, also known as the tall umbrella sedge or umbrella sedge, is a species of plant in the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus distans include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as a diuretic and antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Cyperus distans include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
